title: Biosynthetic Pathway Elucidation and Discovery: From Foundational Concepts to AI-Driven Engineering
description: A comprehensive overview of the strategies, multi-omics technologies, AI methodologies, and metabolic engineering techniques driving the elucidation and industrial production of biosynthetic pathways for natural products.
topic: Biosynthetic Pathway Engineering and Synthetic Biology
audience: Researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
